text.title: Agency Discovery Call Playbook Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 the produced artefact must satisfy. Validator (scripts/validate-agency-discovery-call-playbook.py) enforces required keys + per-field constraints. Forbidden patterns are explicit anti-shapes the validator rejects.

example.note: budget_range, decision_maker, fit_score, next_step, quotes all missing.

forbidden.pattern: Writeup leaves budget_range blank ('they will let us know').
decision_maker is filled with the lead contact who admitted 'I need to check with my boss'.
